response.reasoning: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ years requirement. Strong fullstack background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB explicitly mentioned across recent roles (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq). Current role at re:cinq involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Has Java experience (Altom Consulting, robotic arms) matching secondary stack. Docker, Git, AWS CDK experience present. TDD/testing focus is strong (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner, Selenium courses). Gaps: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned, Vitest not mentioned (uses testing broadly), Kotlin absent (has Java instead), PostgreSQL not explicit (MongoDB/MySQL present), cloud is AWS only (no GCP/Azure). Bachelor's in CS satisfies education. Multiple languages (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python implied through breadth) covered. Speaker/workshop experience indicates communication skills. Strong match overall.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Direct AI agent development experience at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with own test framework and Selenium course authorship
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly listed in stack
Kotlin missing (has Java only); no PostgreSQL explicitly mentioned
Cloud experience limited to AWS; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes hands-on depth shown
response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the seniority bar with a strong, current fullstack TypeScript/Node/React profile and rare direct AI-agent/MCP experience that maps cleanly to the role. Minor gaps in specific framework names (Nest.js, Vitest) and Kotlin are easily bridgeable given the breadth of languages and demonstrated learning agility. Engineering rigor (TDD, own test tooling, workshops) signals exactly the craftsmanship the role wants.
